_comment: Hand-authored ground-truth timeline for the 15s 'The Inhaler' hero clip, RETIMED against the actual generated video (scratch/output/inhaler_kling.mp4) by frame-scrubbing. Deviations from the scripted beats: no visible book fall (event dropped), a crumpled paper toss at ~2.3s instead, inhaler grabbed early (~7.4s) from atop the notebook, two separate shakes, and the press is a long ~2s draw ending ~14.3s. Dynamics arc: frantic and busy -> focused handling -> money moment (canister hiss at ~12.0s) -> long inhale into near-silence. The wheezy breathing is the foley-as-performance element: the video is silent, so every breath is an artistic choice.
ambience: quiet home office room tone, faint muffled afternoon suburb outside; feels emptier and stiller in the final two seconds

events.name: strained wheezy breathing, labored and quick
frantic two-handed paper shuffling and flipping on wooden desk
wooden desk drawer yanked open, hard stop
hand rummaging through pens and small clutter in drawer
papers and desk objects shoved aside, urgent
plastic inhaler snatched off notebook on desk
inhaler canister shaken vigorously, plastic-metallic rattle
hands fumbling with inhaler cap, small plastic clicks
inhaler canister shaken again, plastic-metallic rattle
plastic cap pulled off inhaler mouthpiece
canister press with sharp propellant hiss
long deep inhale through plastic mouthpiece
slow relieved exhale, breathing settles to calm
